_instructions: danger_zones: expanded bounding-box zones around protected objects.
expand = pixels to grow bbox on each side.  Any other object entering = danger.
edge_proximity: objects near the frame/desk edge.
danger_px = red zone, warn_px = yellow zone.
objects = which YOLO classes are checked.
chain_reaction / temporal: tuning for advanced detectors.
_supported_objects_reference: Common COCO classes that YOLO can detect on a desk:
cell phone, laptop, keyboard, mouse, remote, book,
bottle, cup, wine glass, fork, knife, spoon, bowl,
banana, apple, sandwich, orange, pizza, donut, cake,
